string.text: The Barrett XM500 is a self—loading large-caliber sniper rifle developed by the American company Barrett Firearms based on the Barrett M82. 12.7?99 mm (.50 BMG) cartridges are used to fire this rifle. Technically, it is a 10-charge rifle, built in a bullpup layout and uses a gas-discharge automatic with a rotary bolt locking the barrel. The rifle is equipped with an optical sight and a muzzle brake.
